assessment.description: We'll assess you in 3 stages — Core Knowledge (10), Difficulty Calibration (8), and Weak Area Deep Dive (5). Take your time — there's no penalty for wrong answers.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.planExpired: Plan expired — renew to regain access
profile.cancelledBanner: Your subscription is cancelled. You'll keep full {plan} access until {date}, then drop to Free automatically. No further charges.
profile.cancelModalBody: You'll keep full access until {date}, then drop to Free automatically. No refund applies for the current period — that's how our policy works for everyone.
profile.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Too expensive · Not using enough · Missing feature · …
profile.referBlurb: Invite friends and earn {credits} credits for each referral who completes onboarding!
profile.codeNotGenerated: Referral code not yet generated. Complete your profile to get one!
profile.shareMessage: Join me on Nexigrate! Use my code {code} to get 100 bonus credits. {url}
profile.privacyBlurb: Download a JSON file containing every record we hold for you — profile, study progress, chat history, billing, referrals, support tickets and more.
profile.dataExported: Data exported. Check your downloads folder.
profile.dataExportFailed: Failed to export data. Please try again.
profile.dangerBlurb: Permanently delete your account, all study progress, credits, and data. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteModalBody: This permanently removes your profile, study progress, credits, chats, and every other record we hold for you. This cannot be undone.
profile.planCancelledOk: Plan cancelled. Access continues until expiry.
profile.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel. Please try again.
profile.deletePartial: Partial deletion. {n} collections failed — please contact support.
profile.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.

mockTests.title: Mock Tests
mockTests.subtitle: Realistic, AI-generated practice tests for your target exam. Server-timed, server-scored.
mockTests.startMeta: 50 questions · 60 minutes · 3 sections (easy/medium/hard) · −0.25 negative marking · uses 20 credits · timer starts immediately
mockTests.generatingNote: Mock tests use multiple AI calls behind the scenes — this can take 30–90 seconds. We'll cancel automatically if it goes too long.
mockTests.noPastDesc: Your completed mock tests will appear here. Start one above — results are saved automatically when you submit.
mockTests.noPastNote: Note: Tests that failed to generate (timeout/network error) or were abandoned without submitting don't appear here.
mockTests.couldNotLoadHistory: Could not load your past attempts
mockTests.confirmBody: Once you start, the timer is running and 20 credits will be charged. If our AI fails to generate the test, your credits are refunded automatically.
mockTests.noCreditsCharged: No credits were charged — the server only debits credits after the test is fully generated.

leaderboard.title: Quiz Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top scorers on today's Current Affairs quiz. Take the quiz to compete!

revise.title: Revise Today
revise.subtitle: Spaced-repetition brings back chapters right before you'd forget them. Revise, then mark how it went.
revise.allCaughtUpDesc: Nothing due for revision right now. Complete more chapters and they'll show up here on schedule.
revise.saveFailed: Could not save your review. Please try again.

studyPlan.title: Today's Study Plan
studyPlan.subtitleTasks: {count} focused tasks · about {min} min. Built from your revisions, weak areas and syllabus.
studyPlan.subtitleEmpty: A personalized plan from your progress, weak areas and revisions.
studyPlan.nothingScheduledDesc: Start studying a few chapters and we'll build your daily plan from your progress.
studyPlan.dueNote: You have {count} chapter(s) due for revision — open Revise →

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Chat with Nexi or contact admin for help.
support.greeting:
Hi! I'm Nexi Support. I can help you with:

- **Account & billing** issues
- **Credits & chapter unlock** problems
- **Plan upgrades** & payment queries
- **Technical bugs** on the platform

How can I help you today?
support.ticketHeading: Need human help? Create a ticket
support.ticketSub: Admin will reply on your tickets page — typically within 24 hours.
support.subject: Subject
support.subjectPlaceholder: Brief summary (e.g. Payment didn't unlock plan)
support.describePlaceholder: What were you trying to do? What happened? What did you expect?
support.emailIntro: For billing or account issues, email:
support.bothRequired: Both subject and description are required
support.ticketCreated: Ticket created — admin will reply soon

refer.title: Refer & Earn 🎁
refer.subtitle: Invite friends — you earn 50 credits, they get 100
refer.step1Desc: Send your unique referral code to friends via WhatsApp, SMS, or social media
refer.step2Desc: Your friend opens Nexigrate and enters your code during sign-up
refer.step3Desc: You get 50 credits and your friend gets 100 bonus credits to start with.
refer.step4Desc: Refer as many friends as you want — there's no cap on earning.
refer.shareMessage: Join Nexigrate - India's smartest exam prep app! Use my referral code: {code} and get {bonus} bonus credits. Download now: {url}

essay.title: ✍️ Practice Set
essay.subtitle: Write answers, get AI-graded feedback with detailed analysis
essay.unlimited: Unlimited essay grading on your plan
essay.readyDesc: AI will generate a question based on your exam & syllabus. You write the answer, and 3 AI models will grade it like a real examiner.
essay.usedAllToday: You've used all your essays for today. {action}.
essay.upgradeHigher: Upgrade for a higher daily limit
essay.question: Question
essay.gradingMsg: 3 AI models are analyzing your answer...
essay.keepPracticing: Keep practicing. Read the feedback below.
essay.limitMsgDefault: You've reached your essay grading limit for today. The limit resets tomorrow — upgrade for more.

upgrade.subtitle: Unlock unlimited access to accelerate your preparation.
upgrade.reviewPlan: Review your plan and apply a coupon before you pay.
upgrade.creditsInfo: Your current credits: {credits} (preserved across plan changes)
upgrade.footer: Payments processed securely via Razorpay. Plans are one-time charges for the period chosen — there is no auto-renewal. No refunds on paid plans; cancel any time from your profile to stop the next charge while keeping access until the current period ends.
upgrade.footerShort: Payments processed securely via Razorpay. Plans are one-time charges for the period chosen — there is no auto-renewal. No refunds on paid plans.

notify.heading: Notifications
notify.pushDesc: Daily current affairs, streak reminders, exam alerts & doubt replies
notify.blockedMsg: Notifications are blocked for this site. To turn them on, open your browser's site settings (tap the lock icon near the address bar) and allow notifications, then reload. On iPhone, install the app to your Home Screen first.
notify.blockedToast: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser/site settings.

credits.emptyFiltered: No {filter} yet. Start a chapter or take a quiz to see it here.
credits.historyNote: History begins after the credit-ledger upgrade. Older balance changes from before this redesign do not appear here, but your current balance includes them.
